<a id="class-remotetransform3d"></a>

# RemoteTransform3D

**Inherits:** [Node3D](class_node3d.md#class-node3d) **<** [Node](class_node.md#class-node) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

RemoteTransform3D pushes its own [Transform3D](class_transform3d.md#class-transform3d) to another [Node3D](class_node3d.md#class-node3d) derived Node in the scene.

## Description

RemoteTransform3D pushes its own [Transform3D](class_transform3d.md#class-transform3d) to another [Node3D](class_node3d.md#class-node3d) derived Node (called the remote node) in the scene.

It can be set to update another Node's position, rotation and/or scale. It can use either global or local coordinates.

| [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)               | [update_rotation](#class-remotetransform3d-property-update-rotation)               | `true`           |
| [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)               | [update_scale](#class-remotetransform3d-property-update-scale)                     | `true`           |
| [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool)               | [use_global_coordinates](#class-remotetransform3d-property-use-global-coordinates) | `true`           |

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-remotetransform3d-method-force-update-cache"></a>

 **force_update_cache**() [🔗](#class-remotetransform3d-method-force-update-cache)

**RemoteTransform3D** caches the remote node. It may not notice if the remote node disappears; [force_update_cache()](#class-remotetransform3d-method-force-update-cache) forces it to update the cache again.
